programme.title: GolfPass
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: The players turn the world's most famous beach into the ultimate "bunker challenge" before rushing to the Orlando Magic practice facility for a full court putting contest.

programme.title: Highway 18
programme.desc: Starting their day at the Golf Channel studios in Orlando, Florida, each team gets a shot at hosting a highlight package for the PODS Championship at Innisbrook Resort.

programme.title: Private Lessons
programme.desc: J.R. Smith, a two-time NBA champion, visits GolfPass coach Chris Como for a private lesson; after he retired, he enrolled in college and make the North Carolina A&T golf team as a freshman.

programme.title: Hang Tight
programme.desc: Don't go anywhere, we'll be right back.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers want to get the most out of the driver. They demonstrate what the pros look like at impact and share what to do to get into that position.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward cover all things long game from fairway metals to hybrids and even how to master the dreaded long irons. They also teach how finding the low point in the swing helps create consistent strikes.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward explain the big three in iron play: how to control distance, accuracy, and trajectory on shots. They also show a footwork drill to help ball striking and what to do to work the ball into those tucked pins.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward explain how to dial in distances with short irons and how to hit them on line every time; they also explain the bounce angle and how to choose the right amount.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers show how to play a variety of shots around the green, including the high spinning chip, low runner, and many more. They also explain the importance of focusing on a landing zone when hitting greenside shots.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Eight-time PGA Tour winner and 2003 Masters Champion Mike Weir shows how he executes a variety of shots on and around the green. He demonstrates how to hit a bump and run, a high and soft chip, and how to play out of bad lies.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Eight-time PGA Tour winner and 2003 Masters champion Mike Weir shows how he executes a variety of shots on and around the green.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: PGA Tour winner and Masters Champion Mike Weir goes in depth on how he built and adapted his full swing throughout his career. He talks about everything from basic fundamentals all the way through how to hit some of the most unique shots in golf.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: Six in One, Half-Dozen in the Other
programme.desc: Together six men and six women comprise two teams for the ultimate prize of $100,000 and a chance to play in a PGA Tour or LPGA tournament. Featuring Golf Channel's Blair O'Neal.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: One on one, man versus woman, and in the blazing heat of the Dominican Republic, the teams try to keep their composure while competing in the dangerously new challenge Strike Eraser. Featuring Golf Channel's Blair O'Neal.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: Kill Two Birds With One Stone
programme.desc: One team loses a competitor after that player must leave for the hospital due to illness. The stakes get higher when the Flop Wall now leads two competitors to the benching challenge. Featuring Golf Channel's Blair O'Neal.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy gives advice on long game.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy gives tips to overcome the most unusual situations.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Answering questions submitted by members.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: From challenging lies to putting errant shots back on track and more, Rory offers up his approach to handling the kinds of shots and strategy that can improve scores and impress golf buddies.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Chris Como to answer questions covering how to get more distance, the keys to hitting fairway woods, how to play shots from the rough and much more.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy joins Chris Como to answer questions covering distance keys, his pre-shot routine, shot shaping and playing in windy conditions.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Olympic legend Michael Phelps leads Rory McIlroy to discuss what he feels throughout his swing with driver, and how to hit a driver more consistently.

programme.title: Ask Rory
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy examines the swing of NFL cornerback Sauce Gardner and explains why a better takeaway might help him hit his driver better.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Eight-time PGA Tour winner and 2003 Masters Champion Mike Weir shows how he executes a variety of shots on and around the green. He demonstrates how to hit a bump and run, a high and soft chip, and how to play out of bad lies.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: Eight-time PGA Tour winner and 2003 Masters champion Mike Weir shows how he executes a variety of shots on and around the green.

programme.title: Golf Channel Academy
programme.desc: PGA Tour winner and Masters Champion Mike Weir goes in depth on how he built and adapted his full swing throughout his career. He talks about everything from basic fundamentals all the way through how to hit some of the most unique shots in golf.

programme.title: Private Lessons
programme.desc: J.R. Smith, a two-time NBA champion, visits GolfPass coach Chris Como for a private lesson; after he retired, he enrolled in college and make the North Carolina A&T golf team as a freshman.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The skills challenge forces the golfers to choose the shots they believe will deliver the biggest payoff.

programme.title: Hang Tight
programme.desc: Don't go anywhere, we'll be right back.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are sharing wisdom from Masters champions to lower scores.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall shares the wisdom he's learned from some of the greatest Masters Champions. Learn three big swing keys from Jack Nicklaus, how to hit it like Arnold Palmer with the help of two tees, and numerous drills Tiger Woods did at an early age.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: Rematch - Kip Henley vs. Don Donatello
programme.desc: Contestants battle for the opportunity to compete in a professional golf event.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall covers everything from tee to green while answering viewer questions.

programme.title: Hang Tight
programme.desc: Don't go anywhere, we'll be right back.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal are sharing wisdom from Masters champions to lower scores.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall shares the wisdom he's learned from some of the greatest Masters Champions. Learn three big swing keys from Jack Nicklaus, how to hit it like Arnold Palmer with the help of two tees, and numerous drills Tiger Woods did at an early age.

programme.title: The Golf Fix
programme.desc: Devan Bonebrake teaches the key shots that helped players become a Masters Champion; learn to control distance with irons like Tiger Woods, shape shots like Hideki Matsuyama and putt on fast greens like Jack Nicklaus.

programme.title: Swing Expedition With Chris Como
programme.desc: Chris Como travels to Texas and learns the course management strategies Scott Fawcett teaches through a combination of shot distribution patterns and PGA scoring stats. Learn where to aim off the tee and which type of shot to play out of trouble.
